mapper.sql: select rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, prefix, date_format, serial_length, separator, reset_period, current_serial, last_generate_time, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_code_rule
mapper.select:
and rule_code like concat('%', #{ruleCode}, '%') and rule_name like concat('%', #{ruleName}, '%') and status = #{status}
order by rule_id desc
select count(1) from sys_code_rule where rule_code = #{ruleCode} and rule_id != #{ruleId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_code_rule(rule_code, rule_name, prefix, date_format, serial_length, separator, reset_period, current_serial, last_generate_time, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{prefix}, #{dateFormat}, #{serialLength}, #{separator}, #{resetPeriod}, #{currentSerial}, #{lastGenerateTime}, #{status}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{remark})
mapper.update: update sys_code_rule set current_serial = 0, last_generate_time = null, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.delete: delete from sys_code_rule where rule_id in #{ruleId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_code_rule_record(rule_code, generated_code, create_time) values(#{ruleCode}, #{generatedCode}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
